title: MD
biography: Harvey Cushing was an American neurosurgeon regarded as the father of modern neurosurgery. He developed many techniques for operating on the brain and described Cushing's syndrome.
aiSummary: Harvey Cushing is a neurosurgery specialist at Harvard Medical School. Based in Boston.

timeline.title: Pioneered modern neurosurgery
timeline.description: Developed new techniques for operating safely on the brain

timeline.title: Described Cushing's syndrome
timeline.description: Identified the pituitary-adrenal disorder now named after him

timeline.title: Won Pulitzer Prize
timeline.description: For his biography of Sir William Osler
